February CPI shows core inflation cooled, S&P 500 futures jumped amid consumer caution.
news.summary: In February, the consumer price index revealed a larger-than-anticipated decrease in core inflation, indicating consumer reluctance. Concurrently, S&P 500 futures surged. This decline in CPI inflation was attributed to a decrease in travel related to Trump's policies. The situation was outlined in an article by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: New York Comedy Film Festival (NYCFF) to debut in 2026, showcasing comedic films, TV shows, and digital content at Asylum NYC.
news.summary: New York City is set to host the first-ever New York Comedy Film Festival (NYCFF), dedicated to honoring and celebrating comedic films. The event will showcase a variety of humorous content, including films, TV shows, and digital media. Asylum NYC will be transformed into the epicenter of laughter as the festival takes place, offering a platform for comedic talent to shine. Finally, the genre of comedy is receiving the recognition it deserves, with this festival poised to bring joy to audiences and recognition to creators. Mark your calendars for this exciting event showcasing the funnier side of cinema!

news.headline: MY SALON Suite named among top franchises in Entrepreneur Magazine's Franchise 500® ranking after strong year of development.
news.summary: A salon suite franchise based in Carrollton, Texas, known as MY SALON Suite®, has recently been acknowledged on a prestigious list. This recognition comes after a successful year of growth and development for the franchise. MY SALON Suite® offers personalized spaces for beauty, health, and wellness professionals to establish their services. This news was announced on March 12, 2025.

India's gift card market to reach US$10.45 billion by 2025, with a 16.6% annual growth rate. 18.6% CAGR during 2020-2024.
news.summary: In Dublin, a new report titled "India Gift Card and Incentive Card Market Intelligence and Future Growth Dynamics (Databook) - Q1 2025 Update" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The gift card market in India is projected to see a 16.6% annual growth, reaching a value of US$10.45 billion by 2025. From 2020 to 2024, the Indian gift card market demonstrated strong growth, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 18.6%. This positive trend is anticipated to persist, indicating a continued expansion of the market.

news.headline: IDEMIA achieves #1 rankings in all fingerprint benchmarks, showing commitment to accuracy. France, Mar 12, 2025.
news.summary: IDEMIA's leading position signifies their dedication to delivering precise, secure, and cutting-edge solutions for aiding and improving the operations of law enforcement and public safety agencies. Based in COURBEVOIE, France, as of March 12, 2025, IDEMIA Public Security stands out as the primary provider of secure solutions in this sector.

news.headline: Inventor creates Adjustable Potted Plant Stabilizer (ASP-460) to prevent plants from tipping. From Fair Oaks Ranch, Texas.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 12, 2025, an inventor from Fair Oaks Ranch, Texas shared details about the creation of the ADJUSTABLE POTTED PLANT STABILIZER. This product was developed to provide stability to plants and prevent them from tipping over due to wind. The inventor aimed to address the issue of plants being forced to lean to one side. The innovation is designed to be adjustable and effectively support plants in pots.

news.headline: EarthTronics introduces EarthConnect Area Light sensor for outdoor use with daylight sensing, PIR motion detection, & long-range antennas.
news.summary: A Michigan-based company, EarthTronics, has unveiled the EarthConnect Area Light sensor for Luminaire Level Lighting Control (LLLC) applications, primarily designed for outdoor use. This innovative product includes integrated daylight sensing for automatic operation from dusk to dawn, passive infrared (PIR) motion detection, long-range antennas, and a sturdy UV-rated nylon housing. These features aim to enhance energy efficiency and sustainability. EarthConnect's technology offers a comprehensive solution for efficient lighting control, contributing to both economic savings and environmental benefits.

news.summary: In February, the consumer price index indicated a more significant than anticipated decrease in core inflation, reflecting consumer hesitancy. Concurrently, the S&P 500 futures surged. The decline in CPI could be attributed to reduced travel amid the Trump administration's policies. This news was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Austin-based Modern Pediatrics expands to Dallas, providing in-home visits and 24/7 virtual care. Affordable alternative with expanded access.
news.summary: An Austin-based concierge pediatrics group called Modern Pediatrics has recently introduced in-home visits and round-the-clock virtual care services in the Dallas area, starting March 12, 2025. This move aims to provide accessible and convenient healthcare to a wider population. Typically, home-based pediatric care was accessible to only a limited number of individuals at high out-of-pocket expenses. Now, with Modern Pediatrics, more families can benefit from these services at affordable rates, making quality healthcare more readily available.

Benexia introduces innovative chia milk in US market, catering to sustainable and health-conscious consumers.
news.summary: Chia Experts have introduced Seeds of Wellness® Chia Milk to U.S. consumers, offering a novel, healthy, and eco-friendly choice. The product is developed by Benexia®, a prominent company in sustainable chia-based products for more than 20 years. The launch took place in Santiago, Chile on March 12, 2025.

news.headline: Horsesmouth's Savvy Social Security Planning retains #1 ranking in 2025 Advisor Survey, with increased satisfaction rating.
news.summary: In New York, Horsesmouth's Savvy Social Security Planning® software and education suite has once again been ranked as the top choice for financial advisors for the third year running, as per the annual T3/Inside Information Software Survey. The software not only retained its top ranking position but also saw an increase in satisfaction ratings compared to the previous year. It notably stood out as the sole solution in the Social Security category to receive the designation of "So."

Red Cat Holdings appoints Christian Koji Ericson as CFO, effective March 17, 2025. (Numbers not provided)
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Red Cat Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: RCAT) based in Salt Lake City disclosed the appointment of Christian Koji Ericson as the new Chief Financial Officer (CFO), starting from March 17, 2025. The company specializes in drone technology by merging robotic hardware and software for applications in military, government, and commercial sectors.

news.headline: Bitcoin faces US selling pressure amid drop in CPI inflation. BTC/USD trades bearish at $82,400 after reaching $84,437. Core CPI falls to 3.1%, marking first decline since July 2024.BTC Daily Close shows optimism but ETFs see net outflow of $153.87 million, signaling caution among institutional investors.
news.summary: Bitcoin experienced a Wall Street sell-off on March 12, with the price reaching $84,437 before reversing. The US Consumer Price Index fell below expectations at 2.8%, signaling slowing inflation. However, Wall Street trading brought selling pressure, dropping the price to $82,400. Traders highlighted the importance of the 200-day moving averages at $83,550 and $85,650. Bitcoin ETFs saw outflows of $153.87 million, with Grayscale's Bitcoin Trust offloading 641 BTC, totaling $56.45 million. Institutional investors showed caution, with GBTC holdings decreasing to 195,746 BTC worth $17.24 billion. The CPI print may influence the Federal Reserve's interest rate decision.BTC price: $82,400; $84,437US CPI: 2.8%Core CPI: 3.1%BTC outflows: $153.87 millionGBTC holdings: 195,746 BTC, $17.24 billion

A conference call is scheduled to discuss the financial outcomes, with a live webcast accessible to individual investors and the general public from 10:00 a.m., Eastern Time, on the same day. news.headline: Canada Foreign Minister: I will speak to US Secretary of State Rubio about issues including the Ukraine ceasefire.
Dow Jones falls on surprise CPI inflation report; Nvidia, Tesla stocks rally.
news.summary: On Wednesday, the Dow Jones experienced a downturn following an unexpected Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation report. However, there were positive performances from Nvidia and Tesla stocks, which saw an increase in value on the market. This news was highlighted in an article on Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Ethereum trails Bitcoin in recovery, devs focus on Pectra upgrade. Details on the new system in progress.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was highlighted that there has been a significant increase in the number of new Covid-19 cases in the country. The data shows that there were over 10,000 new cases reported in the past 24 hours, raising concerns about the ongoing spread of the virus. Additionally, the number of deaths related to Covid-19 has also seen a notable rise, with more than 200 fatalities reported in the same period. This surge in cases has put a strain on the healthcare system, with hospitals nearing full capacity and medical resources being stretched thin. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety measures and get vaccinated to help curb the spread of the virus.

news.headline: SOLIC Capital Advisors advises ad hoc bondholders of Exela Technologies in restructuring; Chicago-based firm offers financial services.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, SOLIC Capital Advisors, a prominent financial advisory company offering services in investment banking, restructuring, and distressed asset support, has been chosen to represent the ad hoc group of bondholders of Exela Technologies. Exela Technologies is a worldwide company specializing in business process automation.

news.headline: Factura.ai becomes Workday Innovation Partner, offering AI-driven accounts payable solution. Earns Design Approved Badge.
news.summary: Factura.ai, based in ROCKVILLE, Md., unveiled on March 12, 2025, that it has become a Workday Innovation Partner and received the Design Approved Badge. The company leverages advanced machine learning and artificial intelligence technologies to enhance the accounts payable process. This recognition highlights Factura.ai's commitment to innovation in this field.

news.headline: Omni Design Technologies expands with new design center in Austin, TX, adding to 5 other centers worldwide.
news.summary: Omni Design Technologies, a prominent provider of high-performance, low-power Swift™ data acquisition and signal-processing solutions, has revealed the establishment of a new design facility in Austin, Texas. This newly inaugurated center joins Omni Design's existing five state-of-the-art design and development centers located in Northern California, Colorado, Massachusetts, Bangalore, and Hyderabad. The decision to expand to Austin was driven by the city's rich history in circuit design, aligning seamlessly with Omni Design's strategic growth plans.

news.headline: Thomas F. Moser, iconic furniture designer, dies at 90. Founded company in 1972, leaving 50-year legacy.
news.summary: In Auburn, Maine, on March 12, 2025, it was reported that Thomas F. Moser, a prominent woodworker, author, and entrepreneur, passed away on March 5, 2025 at his residence on the coast of Maine. Alongside his wife Mary, he established Thos. Moser Cabinetmakers in 1972. This marks a 50-year legacy that has laid the groundwork for their enduring success in the industry. Tom's entrepreneurship and woodworking expertise have been pivotal in shaping the company's journey.

news.headline: Chubb launches new division focusing on small & lower midmarket segments, with Rob Poliseno as President and Jason Ranucci as COO.
news.summary: Rob Poliseno has been named Division President of Small & Lower Midmarket, while Jason Ranucci has been appointed Chief Operating Officer in the same segments at a company based in Whitehouse. This organization is utilizing a digital operating model to extend Chubb's underwriting and service capabilities to small and lower middle market segments.
